zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Kent於1632年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾文特爾布恩 道千時，他的父親Robert Kent39歲，母親Dorothy Prewett36歲。他於1686年8月5日與Margaret Anderson在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1688年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞享年56歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞。

nameMeanings.name: Kent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from the county of Kent. The surname is also established in Ireland, where English bearers of this name settled in Meath, in the 13th century. The name has been Gaelicized as Ceannt.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

Historical Boundaries: 1682: Pennsylvania, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1685: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Kent was born in 1632, in Winterbourne Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Kent, was 39 and his mother, Dorothy Prewett, was 36. He married Margaret Anderson on 5 August 1686, in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1688, in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, at the age of 56, and was buried in Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States.

Il a épousé Margaret Anderson le 5 août 1686, à Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1688, à Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Kentが1632年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアウィンテルボウルン ダウントセイで生まれた時，父Robert Kentは39歳，母Dorothy Prewettは36歳であった。1686年8月5日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアでMargaret Andersonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1688年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアで56歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアフィラデルフィアにて埋葬された。

ko.Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Kent(이)가 1632년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 윈터보우른 도츠이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Kent(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Prewett(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1686년 8월 5일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아에서 Margaret Anderson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1688년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 필라들필아에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Kent родился в 1632 г. в местности винтирбурн даунци, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Kent было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Prewett, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Anderson 5 августа 1686 г. в местности филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1688 г. в местности филаделфя, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности филаделфя, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.
